title: ilex latifolia var. subrugosa
intro: Ilex latifolia var. subrugosa, also known as the Chinese holly, is a type of plant in the holly family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. The leaves and bark of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ilex latifolia var. subrugosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and reduce swelling, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
